indications.text:
Edarbyclor contains an angiotensin II receptor blocker (ARB) and a thiazide-like diuretic and is indicated
for the treatment of hypertension, to lower blood pressure.
Edarbyclor may be used in patients whose blood pressure is not adequately controlled on monotherapy.
Edarbyclor may be used as initia...
